# Copilot-with-SQL-and-Excel-Assignment

## The following sql files are generated by CO-Pilot.

**How to run it in SSMS**

Open sql/salesdata_ssms.sql in SSMS (or download and open locally).

Select the target database in Object Explorer (or add USE YourDatabaseName; at the top).

Execute the full script. It runs in a transaction and uses MAXRECURSION 0 to allow the 10,000-row generation.

Verify with:

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.SalesData;

Run the included queries at the bottom of the script to see grouped totals and top cities.


## The excel file was solved by CO-Pilot and worksheets were created.

Excel_dataset.csv was base excel file given.

Excel_Copilot_Assignment_Solution.xlsx as solved file.
